quote: One must be poor to know the luxury of giving. – George Eliot
fact: “Ithyphallophobia" is a morbid fear of seeing, thinking about or having an erect penis.
joke: Can a kangaroo jump higher than the Empire State Building? Of course. The Empire State Building can't jump.
